chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 4707 of 2016 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.4720/2023 (C/A) 10.10.2023 Mr. Muhammad Junaid Akram Malik, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Inspector Syed Ameer Ali Shah of DIGP Office, Sukkur and ASI Dhani Bux Bhutto of SSP Office, Sukkur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned AAG has submitted a statement along with documents and states that recommendation for issuing conditional offer order for the post of Police Constable has been received from Inspector General of Police, Sindh, and within fifteen days, concerned SSP shall issue offer order to the petitioner; however, it would be subject to the outcome of appeal against order of this Court pending in the Supreme Court. Learned Counsel for petitioner is satisfied. Accordingly, this contempt application is disposed of. A copy of this order be communicated to Additional Advocate General Sindh for compliance. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
